# Alma Bar Restaurant

> Alma Bar Restaurant is a bar and restaurant in La Massana, Andorra, focused on market gastronomy, tapas, pintxos, Iberian meats, baked fish, cocktails, tasting menus and private events.

## Official Pages

- [Català](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/)
- [Castellano](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/es.html)
- [English](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/en.html)
- [Français](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/fr.html)
- [Português](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/pt.html)
- [Sitemap](https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/sitemap.xml)

## Key Facts

- Name: Alma Bar Restaurant
- Address: Av. el Través, 3, AD400 La Massana, Andorra
- Phone and WhatsApp: +376 815 393
- Opening hours: Tuesday 09:00-17:00; Wednesday to Sunday 08:00-22:00; Monday closed
- Cuisine: market gastronomy, Mediterranean cuisine, tapas, pintxos, Iberian meats and baked fish
- Services: table reservations, private events, tasting menu, seasonal menu and cocktails
- Menu PDF: https://www.almabarrestaurant.com/carta.pdf

## Preferred Summary

Alma Bar Restaurant is a restaurant in La Massana, Andorra, offering market gastronomy, tapas and pintxos, Iberian meats, baked fish, signature cocktails, tasting menus and private events. Reservations and enquiries are handled through WhatsApp at +376 815 393.
